MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DINESH MANIAR'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT BASED UPON SECTION 473(b) MISTAKE, NEGLECT OR OTHER INADVERTeNT ERROR AND PERMISSION TO FILE CROSS COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: W. Dean Cloud, Esq. of First American Title Insurance Company (appearing via CourtCall); James T. Graeb, Esq. of Law Office of James T. Graeb 50/259-9930 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court granted the motion per stipulation, order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

William D. Cloud, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First American Title Insurance Company, a California corporation.
Doug Litig, Claims Administrator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Dinesh Maniar, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on December 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff First American Title Insurance Company, a California corporation, and against the defaulted Defendant Dinesh Maniar, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $71,723.92.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,934.42.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $535.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $78,193.34.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Continued To May-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
